title: tragacantha candolleana
intro: Tragacantha candolleana, also known as the Candolle's Tragacanth or Candolle's Bush, is a type of shrub native to the Mediterranean region. It is a plant with medicinal properties, particularly its sap, which has been used to treat various ailments, including wounds, skin conditions, and digestive issues. The sap of Tragacantha candolleana has anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which make it beneficial for promoting wound healing, reducing inflammation, and preventing infection. In herbal preparations, the sap is often used to make ointments, creams, and salves, which can be applied topically to soothe skin irritations and promote healing.
